flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Canadian Valley Technology Center fell 27% between 2006 and 2009 (50.8% → 37.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Canadian Valley Technology Center rose 42% between 2006 and 2009 (340 → 483).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Canadian Valley Technology Center rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (68.2% → 84.2%).
